text: Morning Jarvis. Can you give me a quick briefing for Friday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Friday, August 30. You have an architecture review at 11 AM, and Ethan's soccer practice at 4 PM.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: Planning for future education costs. First United Mortgage offered 5.65% with zero points. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: Sure thing! Refinancing is a great leverage point. A rate of 5.65% is a big drop from 6.5%. I'll calculate your savings. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Bedtime can be a challenge. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Went for a run around the neighborhood. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: I've logged your vitals. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. Keep stretching that knee!
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. Our Twilio integration is throwing 504 rate limit errors during signups. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: I checked the recent logs for that. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. He is stuck on a math word problem involving division. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: Sure thing! Great update. Try using visual diagrams to explain remainders. He'll get it quickly. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Jarvis, Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has secure messaging. I want to make sure the team doesn't burn out.
title: Work Update

text: I checked the recent logs for that. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping secure messaging in the MVP. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Modified the smart-home alert integrations. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. Space science and tech is a great focus. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Planning for future education costs. We just signed the mortgage papers and closed on our Frisco house. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Got it, Mike. Smart financial planning. Congratulations! Owning your home in Frisco is a major milestone for the family. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Good planning. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Reviewing my sleep tracker logs. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Sure thing! That's good medical feedback. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update: Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. Our Twilio integration is throwing 503 rate limit errors during signups. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've noted that. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Helping Ethan with his homework tonight. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: Understood. That's wonderful. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. We need to back this up with solid performance metrics.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Good focus area. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. That is a clean implementation. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. CareConnect meetings took up most of the day. Ethan did great with his school homework. Got document checklists ready for the mortgage refinance. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
